notes:
• Deadlines from Procedural Order (⌥⌘F): the procedural timetable becomes tickable deadline proposals — future dates only, red in the timeline.
• Apple Calendar sync: upcoming deadlines land in a dedicated matter calendar with reminders 7 days and 1 day ahead; re-sync updates, deleting removes.
• Assistive only — it complements, never replaces, professional deadline control.
